description: Composition Green and blue checked half-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on either chest with brand name embroidery above the left, brand name printed below the nape of the neck, shoulder panels and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
